tool_name: DCOIR Airtable WBS09 UI Native View Creator
trigger_conditions: Use when Airtable native views must be created in bulk through UI automation because API/Scripting Extension view creation is unavailable or unsupported for the target operation.
input_contract: Requires DCOIR_REPO_ROOT and DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR Machine/System environment variables. Requires Node.js/npm and local Playwright Chromium installed by the installer. Uses wbs09_airtable_native_views_manifest.json. Live execution requires ConfirmToken CREATE_WBS09_NATIVE_VIEWS and second interactive confirmation.
output_contract: Writes install, dry-run, calibration, or execution folders under DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR with logs, JSON reports, and optional screenshots.
safety_preconditions: Dry-run first. Calibration second. One-view smoke before bulk. Stop on selector drift, wrong base/table, unexpected modal, duplicate view, or any action outside native grid view creation. No field/schema/record/delete/filter/sort automation in draft.
notes: Register only after local install, dry-run, calibration, and one-view smoke pass.
